subject: 85 years and no one can find you online
body:
Hi there,

I was looking at local shops on the Greensburg square and came across County Supply Hardware. 85 years in business as the local alternative to the big box stores -- that's rare.

But when someone searches for hardware store near Greensburg, you don't come up. Your only online presence is a Facebook page, and Facebook doesn't rank in Google.

I can put together a quick mockup showing how your top products could look online -- clean, modern, easy to browse on any device. Takes me 10 minutes and it's yours to keep.

Want me to send it over?

Eric Lefler
OphidianAI
